doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: fabricated
reason: The PRISMA 2020 citation is real, but the document's content on citation verification and misconduct is not part of the actual PRISMA 2020 statement.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 85
REASON: While PRISMA 2020 (Page et al., BMJ 2021, n71) is real, the quoted content about "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors in Citation Practice" is not part of the actual PRISMA 2020 statement, which focuses on a 27-item reporting checklist.
